description: A statistics card on a dark navy background. The top half is a photograph of President Trump seated at the Resolute Desk in the Oval Office (dark suit, white shirt, dark red tie, lapel pins), with the leather chair, framed family photos and a U.S. Navy flag behind him; he is looking off to the side. Across the lower-middle in large serif type is the text 'American Jobs for' (white italic) above 'AMERICAN WORKERS' (bold white caps). Below sits a small dark badge reading 'The WHITE HOUSE'. Underneath, inside a white text box, centered serif body text states: 'Under President Trump, all job gains have gone to native-born Americans, reversing the Biden-era trend. Over the past year, more than 2.5 million native-born Americans gained employment, while 670,000 foreign-born workers lost employment.' A small circular White House seal icon is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: American Jobs for AMERICAN WORKERS; The WHITE HOUSE; all job gains have gone to native-born Americans; more than 2.5 million native-born Americans gained employment, while 670,000 foreign-born workers lost employment
